description: C# auto-formatting hook using dotnet format

hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.cs) slnfile=$(find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" -maxdepth 2 -name '*.sln' -o -name '*.slnx' 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$slnfile" ] && { dotnet format "$slnfile" --include "$FILE_PATH" --no-restore 2>/dev/null || true; } || { dotnet format --include "$FILE_PATH" --no-restore 2>/dev/null || true; };; esac
